title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!
